expectations.text: Agent explicitly notes which project was active before switching (OLD_PROJECT)
expectations.evidence: Step 1 states: 'OLD_PROJECT: P0043 (EasySAP)' and 'OLD_O: O0043 (corresponding O-entry for EasySAP session logging)'

expectations.text: Agent calls load_project on the target project (P0048)
Agent checks the OLD O-entry for misrouted exchanges (reads O0043 or mentions doing so)
expectations.evidence: Step 3 states: 'Call read_memory(id: "O0043") to fetch today's session and batch nodes from the EasySAP O-entry'

expectations.text: Agent outputs a confirmation showing the activated project and O-entry routing
expectations.evidence: Step 4 shows final output: 'Activated: P0048 hmem / O-entry routing: O0048 / Misrouted exchanges moved: none'

claims.claim: No MCP tools were actually invoked — this is a simulation
claims.evidence: Note at end: 'No MCP tools were actually invoked. The simulation shows what I would check and note...'

claims.claim: The skill examines today's timestamps to determine if any moves are needed
claims.evidence: Step 3: 'Examine the timestamps on all O0043 child nodes (O0043.1, O0043.2, etc.) to identify exchanges created today (2026-04-25)'

suggestions.assertion: Agent checks the OLD O-entry for misrouted exchanges (reads O0043 or mentions doing so)
suggestions.reason: The assertion passes if the agent merely mentions reading O0043 — it could describe the check without demonstrating any real judgment about misrouted content. Consider also asserting that the agent performs content-based classification (not just timestamp filtering) to determine which exchanges belong where.

eval_feedback.overall: Assertions are well-targeted and discriminating. All four steps of the expected skill behavior are covered.
